title: Wedding Photo App With QR Code: Collect Every Guest Photo (No App)
description: Use one QR code to collect every guest photo and video in a private gallery. No app, full quality, free to start.
author: Guestcam Team
tldr: Put a QR code on each table — guests scan and upload photos straight to your private gallery, no app or login needed.
coverAlt: Wedding guests raising phones to take photos during the celebration

content.text: Why you never see most of your guests' photos

Your guests will shoot hundreds of photos on your wedding day, but most never reach you — they stay buried in camera rolls and WhatsApp threads. A wedding photo app built around a QR code fixes this: guests scan, upload, and everything lands in one private gallery you actually keep.

content.alt: Guest scanning a QR code on a wedding table to upload photos
content.caption: One scan and a guest uploads photos in full quality — no app needed.

content.text: How a wedding QR code works

items: Create a private gallery in Guestcam in a few clicks.
Pick a QR card template, add your names and date, and print it for the tables.
Guests scan the code, the gallery opens in their browser, and they upload photos and videos in seconds.
You collect everything live and download it all as a ZIP afterwards.

content.text: Why it beats a WhatsApp group
WhatsApp compresses photos and often refuses videos; shared cloud albums need the right account. A QR-code gallery removes the friction and keeps everything in original resolution, privately.
Private and full quality by default

Your gallery is reachable only through your QR code or link, with optional password protection. Every photo and video is stored at full resolution — so the candid shot a friend grabbed is as sharp as the professional's.

content.alt: Bride and groom with guests on the dance floor
content.caption: Guest photos capture the candid moments — the dance floor, the speeches, the laughter.

content.q: Do guests need to download an app?
content.a: No. Everything runs in the phone's browser — guests scan the QR code and upload immediately, with no installation or login.
Yes. The gallery is only accessible via your QR code or link, with optional password protection. Nothing is public.

content.q: What quality are photos stored in?
content.a: Full original resolution, with no compression — for both photos and videos.
The gallery stays active for the length of your plan and you can download everything as a ZIP or save it to Google Drive.
